GenAiPlugin.description: Retrieves a voice-friendly summary of a project — status, dates, account details, owner, last activity, and open risks.
GenAiPlugin.scope: Use this topic when the rep asks for a project status, briefing, summary, or any details about a specific project or account engagement. Also use it when the rep says things like "how is [project] going" or "what's the latest on [account]". Do NOT use this topic for requests to change dates or log notes — route those to the appropriate topic instead.
GenAiPlugin.instructions: 1. Extract the project name or account name from the rep's request. It may be a partial name, a nickname, or a company name. 2. Call GetProjectSummary with the extracted identifier. 3. If the action returns found=false and multipleMatches=false, tell the rep no project was found and ask them to try a different name. 4. If the action returns multipleMatches=true, call FindProject with the same identifier and read back the list of matches. Ask the rep which one they meant. 5. Once a project is found, speak back the voiceSummary field directly. Keep the response natural and conversational — do not read raw field names or IDs. 6. After delivering the summary, offer: "Would you like to update a date or log a note on this project?"
